content.en:
Now.

Ye Tian's aura was rising at an incredible speed, transforming every moment, and his physical body was constantly increasing.

This is the process of transforming the Ka Ye wisdom body from the first layer of small Cheng to the first layer of Dacheng, once the breakthrough is successful, his strength will not only skyrocket, but also all abilities will skyrocket, and his combat power will far surpass the past.

After a long time, Ye Tian completely completed the breakthrough.

"The first layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body has been completed, once the Ka Ye wisdom body is raised to the limit of the first layer of Dacheng in the future, it can impact the second layer realm!"

The second layer of the Kasa Wisdom Body is more powerful, but it is too difficult to raise the Kasa Leaf Wisdom Body to the second level of the realm.

Even if he had a steady stream of multi-dimensional treasure essence, it would not be so easy.

Because the advancement of this innate multi-dimensional Dao body is not only related to resources, but also related to the realm of extra-dimensional rules.

His current realm of extradimensional rules is not high, and it is not easy to forcibly improve the wisdom body of Kasya.

But 26, he's happy now.

In the transcendent realm of the third realm, almost none of them had ever cultivated an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, let alone a perfect innate multi-dimensional Dao body, he was already invincible at this level.

And as his Ka Ye wisdom body was promoted to the first level of the Dacheng realm, his combat power was enough to rival the extradimensional realm that had not long advanced to the fourth realm.

"Try the effect of the multi-dimensional wisdom light of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body!"

Ye Tian immediately unleashed the innate multi-dimensional secret technique of multi-dimensional wisdom light, and his comprehension thoughts skyrocketed many times in an instant.

Immediately, he comprehended the extradimensional rules, and its effect was far beyond the past.

"The effect is very good, even if you don't use any treasures to assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules, you can feel the progress of the extradimensional rules only with the help of multi-dimensional wisdom light, which you can't do in the past!"

Ye Tian was very satisfied with the multi-dimensional wisdom light of the first layer of the Dacheng realm.

After the Kasa Wisdom Body reaches the first level of the Dacheng realm, it will not take a short time to ascend to the second level of the realm.

According to Ye Tian's estimate, it would take at least about 2,000 extradimensional eras for him to complete his cultivation breakthrough, and at that time, his cultivation was estimated to be able to advance to the peak realm of the third realm.

This time is a bit long for him, but for the other third and even fourth realms, it is very short.

Of course.

If he had other opportunities during the period, he would have been able to speed up his cultivation.

"It's time to unleash the Tricky Wood Red Dragon!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At the beginning, he cooperated with the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, and when he cultivated to break through to the fourth realm, he released the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, although his current cultivation is still the third realm, but his combat power is already comparable to the average fourth realm, so it is naturally able to destroy the formation that seals the Tricky Wood Red Dragon and release it.

And he wasn't worried that the Tricky Wood Red Dragon would threaten his safety, and the other party's strength was not as good as him now.

......

Red Dragon Yuan.

Ye Tian came here, and after sensing Ye Tian's breath, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon woke up.

"Ye Tian, you're here!"

Weimu Chilong thought that Ye Tian had something to ask for advice.

Ran Ye Tian said directly: "Tricky Wood Red Dragon, I now have the combat power of the Fourth Realm, I should be able to rescue you, right?"

"You now have the combat power of the Fourth Realm?" the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was surprised.

At the beginning, although the strength displayed by Ye Tian could be called invincible in the third realm, it was only invincible, even if he could block a move in the fourth realm, it was far from being the combat power of the fourth realm.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian directly erupted into the first layer of the Great Completion Realm's Jiaye Wisdom Body, and this terrifying aura shocked the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

"The first layer of the Great Cheng Realm's Ka Ye Wisdom Body, how did you do it? No, you snatched the Duowei Treasure Gourd!" Trick Wood Chilong guessed, "No, even if you obtain the Duowei Treasure Gourd, you don't have enough special resources, and you can't nourish the Duowei Treasure Gourd and condense enough Multi-Dimensional Treasure Treasure Essence!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon was very puzzled.

Ye Tian said lightly: "Tricky Wood Red Dragon, I can rescue you, don't ask about anything else." "

"Okay, Ye Tian, hurry up and save me!"

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, you are working inside the seal, I am attacking outside the seal, the inside should be combined with the outside, and the seal will be broken!"

Ye Tian reminded.

"Good!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon began to attack the seal with all his might.

Thundered!!!!!

Under the full impact of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, the seal emerged, and the seal map formed by the dense power of the extradimensional rules spread all over the void, wrapping the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

Seeing this, Ye Tian urged the Ka Ye Wisdom Body and the extradimensional rules with all his strength, and broke out with all his strength.

The devastating light struck the seal, causing a crack in the seal.

"Go on!"

Thundered!!!!

The seal was gradually shattered.

Soon, the seal dissipated.

"Hahahaha, I'm finally out of trouble!!"

The huge body of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon roamed in this Void of Death, its body constantly absorbing the energy of the outside world, and its aura became more and more powerful.

The countless years of sealing made him a little weak, but he was able to recover quickly.

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, I have released you, and the cooperation between you and me is over!"

Ye Tian said.

And he also sensed that the oath restraint had dissipated, and he was in a very good mood.

The body of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon shrank, turning into a 113 humanoid Tricky Wood Red Dragon, looking at Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, thank you. The Tricky Wood Red Dragon thanked.

"It's nothing, it's just cooperation, and I've gained enough benefits!" Ye Tian said lightly.

Just as he was about to leave, Weimu Chilong said, "Ye Tian, let's cooperate, how about it?"

"Still cooperating?" Ye Tian was surprised, "What are you cooperating?"

Tricky Wood Red Dragon said: "Ye Tian, do you know why I was sealed?"

Ye Tian shook his head and had never asked this question.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon fell into response, and quickly sighed again: "Actually, I come from a very large race, the Red Flame Dragon Clan, which is a very powerful race of top extradimensional creatures, but I offended a powerful existence in the clan and was forced to leave the Red Flame Dragon. The reason why I came here with poor resources was because of a great opportunity. It's just that other strong people compete with me for this opportunity, but because of my special identity, the other party doesn't dare to kill me. Because once I kill a Red Flame Dragon, I will be planted with the Red Flame Dragon Seal, which cannot be erased unless it is the fifth realm, so the other party will not dare to kill me. "

"Big chance?"

Ye Tian's heart moved.

To be able to make a third-realm extreme powerhouse like Tricky Wood Red Dragon call it a great opportunity, I'm afraid it's really not an ordinary big opportunity!

He has some anticipation and longing.
